summary: Provision AWS Resource Access Manager shares. Creating a share is an engineer-gated form with external principals disabled by default; the trust boundary a share crosses is reviewed before it is populated.

operations.title: Provision a resource share
operations.summary: Create a RAM resource share with external principals disabled. Sharing crosses the account trust boundary.
operations.description: Create an aws_ram_resource_share. Sharing crosses the account trust boundary, so external principals are disabled by default; the resources and principals a share grants are added as a reviewed follow-up. Submitting drafts the resource and routes it to an engineer to review and finish.

params.name: share_name
params.label: Share name
params.help: The name of the resource share (written to the name attribute).

params.name: allow_external_principals
params.label: Allow external principals
params.help: Sharing with principals outside the organization is disabled by default; written into the draft, never asked.

params.name: description_tag
params.label: Description
params.help: A short description recorded as the resource's Description tag.

params.name: pic
params.label: Person in charge
params.help: The team or person accountable for this resource, recorded as its PIC tag.

decisions: A resource share crosses the account trust boundary: sharing with principals outside the organization is disabled by default here, and enabling external principals or adding shared resources and principals is an engineer-reviewed follow-up.
Confirm which resources and principals the share grants before it is populated; a share with external principals exposes resources outside the account.
